Description: Verify user can view their borrowing/activity history
Test Steps: 1. Login as user 2. Navigate to Activity Dashboard 3. View history section
Expected Output: List of borrowed books with dates and actions displayed
Actual Output: Activity Dashboard loaded and displayed a chronological list of borrowed books with timestamps and action labels

Description: Verify reading statistics (streak; velocity; books read) are shown
Test Steps: 1. Login as user 2. Open Activity Dashboard 3. Check stats panel
Expected Output: Reading velocity; current streak; and books read count displayed correctly
Actual Output: Stats panel displayed reading velocity; current streak count; and total books read with correct values from the database

Description: Verify borrowing history can be filtered by book title
Preconditions: User has borrowing history with multiple different books
Test Steps: 1. Login as user 2. Navigate to Activity Dashboard 3. Apply filter by title keyword 4. View results
Expected Output: Only entries matching Clean Code displayed in history list
Actual Output: Borrowing history filtered correctly; only entries related to Clean Code appeared in the filtered list

Description: Verify the system displays an appropriate message when a new user has no history
Preconditions: New user account with no recorded activity
Test Steps: 1. Register a new user 2. Login 3. Navigate to Activity Dashboard 4. Check history section
Test Data: New user with no borrowed books
Expected Output: Empty state message shown indicating no borrowing activity has been recorded
Actual Output: Activity Dashboard displayed an empty state message indicating no borrowing activity has been recorded for this user

Description: Verify the reading streak resets to zero when user misses a day of activity
Preconditions: User has an active reading streak of 5 days
Test Steps: 1. Login as user with 5-day streak 2. Simulate no reading activity for 1 day 3. Re-login 4. Check streak count
Expected Output: Streak count resets to 0 after one day of inactivity
Actual Output: Reading streak reset to 0 after the simulated inactivity period; dashboard updated to reflect the new streak value

Description: Verify the reading velocity metric is calculated correctly based on pages read
Preconditions: User has reading progress data from the past 7 days
Test Steps: 1. Login as user 2. Open Activity Dashboard 3. View Reading Velocity metric 4. Verify calculation
Expected Output: Velocity shown as 20 pages per day (140 / 7)
Actual Output: Reading velocity displayed as 20 pages per day matching the expected calculation from total pages read in the past week

Description: Verify the reader resumes from the last saved page position
Preconditions: User previously read a book and closed it at page 15
Test Steps: 1. Login as user 2. Open the previously read book 3. Observe starting page
Test Data: bookId: previously read book; last page: 15
Expected Output: Book opens at page 15 automatically without manual navigation
Actual Output: Book opened at page 15 as expected; the reader resumed from the last saved position automatically

Test Steps: 1. Navigate to a specific page. 2. Click Bookmark icon.
Expected Output: Bookmark icon changes state. Page number is saved to the user's bookmark list.
Actual Output: Bookmark icon updated visually and page bookmarked successfully.

Test Steps: 1. Select a block of text. 2. Click the Highlight option.
Expected Output: Selected text background turns yellow (or designated highlight color).
Actual Output: Text was successfully highlighted visually on the screen.
